notes: Boss Rush v4. CHANGED: death = match end (no respawn). Attack cadences cranked across all difficulties — Normal aimed spray every 1.6s (was 3.0s), radial burst every 3.0s (was 6.0s), spiral active on all difficulties (was Hard+). Volleys bigger: 4-10 bullets per spray, 14-29 per radial ring (random rotation). NEW: 0.45s pre-attack telegraphs — fan of red beams before aimed spray, collapsing pulsing ring before radial burst, charging cross-hatch in center. Screen flash + shake on every volley. Boss bullets are 2-2.4× bigger and color-coded per pattern (red/amber/magenta).
